messages.content: Hello, how can I assist you today?
how can I assisted today Kaise
Main aapki madad karne ke liye yahaan hoon, aap mujhe apni samasya ya prashna bataye.
main aapki madad karne ke liye Yahan Hun Aap Mujhe Apni samasya ya prashn bataen
Aapne toh meri hi baat dubara kah di, ab aap apni samasya ya prashna bataiye, main aapki madad karne ke liye tayyar hoon.
Aap kya karna chahte hain? Study mode, friend mode, ya kuch aur?
Aap kya achieve karna chahte hain, apne AI project Jarvis ke liye, ya phir System Design, DSA, ya interview prep ke liye?
aap kya Ajeeb karna chahte hain ya FIR system design
Main aapke saath System Design par charcha karna chahta hoon, ya phir Jarvis project par kaam karna chahta hoon. Aap kya chunna chahte hain?
main aapke sath system design per Charcha karna chahta hun ya FIR Jarvis project per kam karna chahta hun
Theek hai, aaiye System Design par charcha karte hain. Aap kis topic par charcha karna chahte hain, jaise ki Microservices, Scalability, Database Design, ya phir kuch aur?
aap kis topic per Charcha karna chahte hain jaise ki Microsoft scalability Samjho
Aaiye Scalability par charcha karte hain. Scalability ke liye kya zaroori hai, jaise ki Load Balancing, Caching, Database Sharding, aur Microservices architecture?

Load Balancing aur Server ko optimize karne ke liye kya strategies hain? Jaise ki:

* Horizontal Scaling (jyada servers add karna)
* Vertical Scaling (ek server ko powerful banaana)
* Load Balancing Algorithms (jaise ki Round-Robin, Least Connection, etc.)
* Server Clustering (multiple servers ko ek saath chalana)

Aap kya sochte hain?
